data.title: Arc Flash Analysis That Goes The Extra Mile
data.body: Carelabs provides comprehensive arc flash hazard analysis services for industrial and commercial facilities across the United States. Our IEEE 1584-2018 compliant studies deliver accurate incident energy calculations and PPE category assignments.
data.metaTitle: Arc Flash Analysis in the USA- Boost Safety, Cut Costs
data.metaDescription: Experience unparalleled arc flash analysis designed to safeguard your operations. Trust our expertise for compliance and risk mitigation.
data.heroImageAlt: Carelabs engineer performing arc flash study at a US industrial facility
data.featuresSubtext: Arc flash analysis is a critical study identifying potential risks hidden in an electrical system. It is one study with many benefits.

features.title: Workplace Safety
features.description: Enhance workplace safety through risk assessment and mitigation strategies in arc flash analysis.

features.title: Regulatory Compliance
features.description: Ensure your facility meets OSHA, NFPA 70E, and IEEE standards for electrical safety compliance.

features.title: Equipment Damage Prevention
features.description: Identify and mitigate risks that could cause costly equipment damage from arc flash incidents.

features.title: Costly Downtime Reduction
features.description: Prevent unplanned outages and reduce costly downtime through proactive arc flash risk assessment.

features.title: Proper PPE Selection
features.description: Determine the correct Personal Protective Equipment requirements for every point in your electrical system.

data.safetyBody: CareLabs offers all-inclusive arc flash analysis services for industries across the USA. We offer bespoke power system solutions to suit your specific needs.
safetyBullets: Technical support like incident energy calculations, arc flash boundary recommendations, and PPE selection.
Functional Support like system modeling, labeling, and recommendations on system adjustments.
Strategic support in risk mitigation, PPE implementation, etc.
Regulatory compliance support like implementing OSHA or NFPA 70E standards.
Software support like the use of advanced simulation tools like ETAP.
data.safetyImageAlt: Electrical worker wearing arc flash PPE during energized work
data.reportsBody: Comprehensive reports prepared by experts at CareLabs, USA. They contain many details from data collection to arc flash labeling.
reportsBullets: Single Line Diagram of the system
data.reportsImageAlt: Arc flash study report and IEEE 1584 calculations from Carelabs

processSteps.title: Facility Data Collection
processSteps.description: We gather electrical drawings, equipment nameplates, utility fault current data, and protective device settings.

processSteps.title: System Modeling in ETAP
processSteps.description: Our engineers build a detailed power system model in ETAP software, validating against field measurements.

processSteps.title: Short Circuit Analysis
processSteps.description: We calculate available fault currents at every bus — required inputs for IEEE 1584 arc flash calculations.

processSteps.title: Protective Device Coordination
processSteps.description: We verify or optimize protective device settings to minimize incident energy through reduced clearing times.

processSteps.title: IEEE 1584 Arc Flash Calculations
processSteps.description: Using the validated ETAP model, we perform arc flash calculations per IEEE 1584-2018 for all equipment in scope.

processSteps.title: Report Delivery & Label Generation
processSteps.description: We deliver a complete engineering report, NFPA 70E arc flash labels, and a presentation to your team.

data.ctaBannerBody: We help convert your obstacles into innovative solutions. Future-proof your electrical infrastructure with our innovative solutions.
data.footerDescription: Carelabs provides professional electrical safety services including arc flash studies, power system analysis, and compliance solutions for industrial and commercial facilities across the United States.
data.definitionalLede: As Arc Flash experts, we offer precision, protection, and performance in every project, delivering results beyond electrical safety and compliance. Are you looking for professional arc flash experts in the USA?
